name: Five Iron Golf
address: 729 N Washington Ave Suite D, Minneapolis, MN 55401
about: Five Iron Golf Minneapolis North Loop is an indoor golf facility that combines Trackman simulator technology with a full-service sports bar and lounge. The venue offers a spacious outdoor patio and is located in the North Loop neighborhood, featuring custom-built golf simulator bays for up to six people. Pricing varies by day and time, with memberships starting at $139 per month that include free daily golf and discounts on other services. It is best suited for social golfers, groups, and those seeking a casual yet technologically advanced golfing experience paired with food and drinks.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman technology for accurate swing data
Full-service bar and chef-inspired menu available on-site
Flexible membership options with free daily play and discounts
No-dress-code atmosphere makes golf accessible for everyone
Ability to play at PGA Tour venues like Pebble Beach virtually

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service restaurant with chef-inspired menu available
Full-service bar with craft cocktails and local draft beers

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual-radar Trackman technology with high-speed cameras for accurate ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs as they are not provided. However, club rentals are available.

faq.question: Can I bring outside food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food or drinks are not allowed. The venue offers a full-service bar and restaurant on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time varies, but a typical round of 18 holes can take approximately 1-2 hours depending on the group size and pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Five Iron Golf offers kids' parties and junior clinics, making it a kid-friendly venue.
